event: Harbour at St. Jean Cap Ferrat
description: An impressionist painting of a Mediterranean harbour. A white building with arched openings sits along the waterfront at center-right. Several small boats are moored in the calm water, their masts and hulls reflected in the blue-green surface. The light is warm and hazy, with a pale yellow sky at left suggesting morning or late afternoon. The brushwork is loose and luminous, capturing the play of light on water and architecture.

_meta.title: The Harbour at St. Jean Cap Ferrat
